blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,703 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
